mapper.select: select menu_id from sb_work_group_menu where group_id = #{groupId} and ifnull(del_flag,'0') = '0'
select menu_id from sb_work_group_menu where group_id = #{groupId} and (customer_id = #{customerId} or (customer_id is null and #{customerId} is null)) and ifnull(del_flag,'0') = '0'
mapper.update: update sb_work_group_menu set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate(), del_flag = '1' where group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: insert into sb_work_group_menu (id, group_id, menu_id, customer_id, create_by, create_time, del_flag) values (#{id}, #{groupId}, #{menuId}, #{customerId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), ifnull(#{delFlag},'0'))

insert into sb_work_group_menu (id, group_id, menu_id, customer_id, create_by, create_time, del_flag) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate(), ifnull(#{item.delFlag},'0'))
on duplicate key update delete_by = null, delete_time = null, del_flag = '0'
